ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week the event falls on */,
  "holiday" TEXT /* Name of the holiday or event */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Public Holiday, Season) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the event occurs */,
  "proclamation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the official proclamation for the event */,
  "observance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to any observances or traditions associated with the event */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Is the event recurring? */,
  "recurring_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the recurring event (e.g., daily, weekly, yearly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the recurring event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the recurring event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_proclamation_id FOREIGN KEY ("proclamation_id") REFERENCES proclamations ("proclamation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_observance_id FOREIGN KEY ("observance_id") REFERENCES observances ("observance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year name */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the year (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proclamations" (
  "proclamation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proclamation */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the proclamation is for */,
  "proclamation_text" TEXT /* Text of the official proclamation */,
  "issued_by" TEXT /* Name of the official who issued the proclamation */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the proclamation was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the proclamation expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proclamation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observances" (
  "observance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observance */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the observance is for */,
  "observance_name" TEXT /* Name of the observance or tradition */,
  "observance_description" TEXT /* Description of the observance or tradition */,
  "observance_date" TEXT /* Date the observance or tradition occurs */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Is the observance active? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., Public Holiday, Season) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event detail */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the detail is for */,
  "historical_context" TEXT /* Historical context of the event */,
  "public_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on public life */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the event */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the event image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_details_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, event planner, public) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public announcement */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the announcement is for */,
  "announcement_text" TEXT /* Text of the public announcement */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date the announcement was made */,
  "public_url" TEXT /* URL for the public announcement */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Is the announcement published? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_announcements_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the impact is for */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of impact (e.g., traffic, business closures) */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  "impact_date" TEXT /* Date the impact was observed */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the impact (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_impact_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the schedule is for */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "schedule_description" TEXT /* Description of the event schedule */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedules_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the notification is for */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the review is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reviews_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
